summary: Phase 1c spec review iteration 2: PASS. All 14 previous findings (4 HIGH, 8 MEDIUM, 2 LOW) from iteration 1 are resolved. The behavioral spec now correctly reflects domain design from ui-fields.md, workflows.md, and aggregates.md. FIND-003 (activeFilterTags preservation) is addressed with explicit reducer pattern. FIND-004 (FeedDomainSnapshot extension) is resolved by computing TagInventory client-side. The verification architecture adds 6 new PROPs (PROP-TAG-010a, 010b, 028, 029, 031, 032, 033) covering previously missing edge cases and proof obligations. Traceability is corrected (PROP-TAG-021 now maps to REQ-TAG-005). Five new findings were identified: 1 HIGH (typed text not preserved across snapshot events - FIND-015), 1 MEDIUM (filter application data flow underspecified - FIND-016), 3 LOW (parseFilterInput/reconcile inconsistency, blur keep-open ambiguity, missing PROP for text preservation). These are narrow issues that do not block advancement to Phase 2.
